_notes: Goals for the weekly GSC report. Position is lower-is-better; everything else is higher-is-better. Status thresholds: on-track ≥ 90% of target, behind 50-90%, way-behind < 50% (inverted for position). Updated 2026-05-08 after autopilot launch (3 articles/week Mon/Wed/Fri) + library Stage 1 title overhaul (1,058 pages re-targeted) + 4 new articles already shipped + acme-analytics decay completing.

3_months.label: 3-month goal (Aug 8, 2026)
3_months.rationale: Acme decay fully complete + ~36 autopilot articles shipped + library Stage 1 effect kicks in around month 2

6_months.label: 6-month goal (Nov 8, 2026)
6_months.rationale: ~72 autopilot articles + library Stage 2 (content enrichment) ideally shipped + 5-8 articles ranking page 1

12_months.label: 12-month goal (May 8, 2027)
12_months.rationale: 150+ articles, library fully optimized, 30-50 page-1 keywords, domain authority climbing, library entries each averaging 30+ impressions/mo
